declared_unit: 1 piece of Door assembly (1 m wide, 2.7 m height opening door, glass thickness 10 mm)
note: EPD covers 7 different door models, each with its own GWP results. Values reported here are for Model 1 (Acosoft 40 Sliding Door, Single Glazed) from Table 10. GWP-total A1-A3 = 5.19E+02, GWP-fossil = 5.23E+02, GWP-biogenic = -5.22 kg CO2 eq. Other models differ: A1-A3 GWP-total ranges roughly 386 (Model 2) to 627 (Model 6) kg CO2 eq. GWP-GHG (excl. biogenic) indicator not separately reported.
